since_last: 41% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.52%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.24% · BTC +3.18% · Gold -0.37% · Nasdaq100 +0.40%. 41% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.52%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.52%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.53%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +9.05%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +9.05%, DELL +5.98%, MU +5.83%, INTC +5.47%, VRT +4.02%. Laggards: AVAV -6.76%, SPCX -6.49%, OKLO -4.02%, OKLO -4.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.49% at $173.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
